NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TIDE.title: Tide
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_EQUITABLE_JUDGMENT.desc: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Costs 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] you have. Remove all [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold]. Lose {CalculatedHpLoss:diff()} HP.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_FINAL_JUDGMENT.title: Final Judgment
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_FINAL_JUDGMENT.descript: Kill a non-[gold]Boss[/gold] enemy. [gold]Boss[/gold] enemies instead lose [blue]50%[/blue] of their current HP.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LIVING_WATER.title: Living Water
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CONVERGING_TIDES.title: Converging Tides
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CONVERGING_TIDES.descri: Whenever you play Equitable Judgment, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TIDES_I_HAVE_RETURNED.d:
Add {Cards:diff()} {IfUpgraded:show:Equitable Judgment+|Equitable Judgment} to your hand.
After you play an Equitable Judgment, [gold]Surge[/gold] 2{IfUpgraded:show: twice|}.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RED_TIDE.title: Red Tide
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SURGING_TORRENT.title: Surging Torrent
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SUMMONS_TO_COURT.title: Summons to Court
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_IRONCLAD_EVIDENCE.title: Ironclad Evidence
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_IRONCLAD_EVIDENCE.descr:
Remove X [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold],
[gold]Submit[/gold] up to X cards from your [gold]Hand[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SILENCE.title: Silence
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SILENCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Submit[/gold] 1 card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_IN_DEPTH_INQUIRY.title: In-Depth Inquiry
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_IN_DEPTH_INQUIRY.descri:
Remove all [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold].
For every 2 removed, give 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] 1 [gold]Replay[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SELF_INFLICTED.title: Self-Inflicted
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SELF_INFLICTED.descript:
Deal damage equal to the target's attack intent.{IsTargeting:
(Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage, hitting {CalculatedHits:diff()} times)|}
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CANE_STRIKE.title: Cane Strike
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PUNISHMENT.title: Punishment
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PUNISHMENT.description: Deal damage equal to your [gold]Surge[/gold] stacks.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RETRIAL.title: Retrial
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RETRIAL.description:
Gain 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Remove 2 [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] to apply {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] instead.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_WATER_TASTING.title: Water Tasting
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_WATER_TASTING.descripti: At the end of combat, gain {MaxHp:diff()} Max HP.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_DEFENSE.title: Defense
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_COUNTING_SINS.title: Counting Sins
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_NO_RETRIAL.title: No Retrial
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_AWE_INSPIRING.title: Awe Inspiring
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_AWE_INSPIRING.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Remove 1 [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] to apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CLEAR_SKIES.title: Clear Skies
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CLEAR_SKIES.description:
Lose [blue]{HpLoss:diff()}[/blue] HP.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Next turn, [gold]Surge[/gold] {Surge:diff()}.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_EVIDENCE.title: Evidence
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_INTERROGATION.title: Interrogation
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_INTERROGATION.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Shuffle an [gold]Evidence[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ANNOUNCE_NO_CRIME.title: Announce No Crime
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ANNOUNCE_NO_CRIME.descr: Set all creatures' HP to [blue]50%[/blue] of their Max HP.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SOURCE_OF_LIFE.title: Source of Life
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SOURCE_OF_LIFE.descript:
{IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Surge[/gold] {Surge:diff()}.
|}[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] to gain that much {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_STILLED_WELL.title: Stilled Well
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_DOWNPOUR.title: Downpour
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_DOWNPOUR.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LEGAL_AID.title: Legal Aid
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_HYDRO_DRAGON.title: Hydro Dragon
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_HYDRO_DRAGON.descriptio:
Lose {MaxHp:diff()} Max HP.
Add a [gold]Final Judgment[/gold] to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_OBJECTION_OVERRULED.des:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Remove {DropletsToConsume:diff()} [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] to [gold]Stun[/gold] the target.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PLUIE_SUR_LA_VILLE.desc: At the start of your turn, lose 2 HP and gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SIN_UPON_SIN.title: Sin Upon Sin
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SIN_UPON_SIN.descriptio: Choose an enemy. Whenever you gain [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] this turn, apply {SinUponSinPower:diff()} [gold]Contempt of Court[/gold] to it.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ASSIST_ARREST.title: Assist Arrest
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ASSIST_ARREST.descripti: Whenever you heal, [gold]Summon[/gold] the same amount.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SIPHON_PRIMORDIAL_SEA.d: At the start of your turn, remove {SiphonPrimordialSeaPower:diff()} [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] to gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LET_THE_MIGHTY.title: Let the Mighty
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LET_THE_MIGHTY.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deals double damage to Elites.
Deals quadruple damage to [gold]Boss[/gold] enemies.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RESIST_STRICTLY.title: Resist Strictly
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RESIST_STRICTLY.descrip: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply {ContemptOfCourtPower:diff()} [gold]Contempt of Court[/gold]. If the target intends to attack, apply {ContemptOfCourtPower:diff()} more.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ACCUSATION.title: Accusation
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ADJOURNMENT.title: Adjournment
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_WALK_INTO_RAIN.title: Walk into Rain
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TIMELY_RAIN.title: Timely Rain
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TIMELY_RAIN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If your HP is at or below [blue]50%[/blue], [gold]Surge[/gold] {Surge:diff()} and draw 1 card.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TSUNAMI.title: Tsunami
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TSUNAMI.description: [gold]Surge[/gold] for an amount equal to {IfUpgraded:show:[blue]75%[/blue]|[blue]50%[/blue]} of your Max HP.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_GOD_OF_LIFE.title: God of Life
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_GOD_OF_LIFE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Surge[/gold] {Surge:diff()}.
In this combat, gain {MaxHp:diff()} Max HP.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LEVIATHAN_FORM.title: Leviathan Form
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LEVIATHAN_FORM.descript: In this turn, your HP is [gold]infinite[/gold]. After every 5 turns, repeat this effect.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TEARS_I_SHALL_REPAY.des:
[gold]Surge[/gold] 2 twice.
Add 2 {IfUpgraded:show:Equitable Judgment+|Equitable Judgment} to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_DRAGON_TREASURE.title: Dragon Treasure
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_DRAGON_TREASURE.descrip: At the end of combat, obtain 1 [gold]Relic[/gold], 1 potion, 20 [gold]Gold[/gold], and 3 Max HP. Remove this card from your deck.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_EQUAL_TREATMENT.title: Equal Treatment
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_EQUAL_TREATMENT.descrip: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Remove all [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] and apply that much [gold]Contempt of Court[/gold] to them.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_INITIAL_WARNING.title: Initial Warning
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ENFORCE_EXECUTION.title: Enforce Execution
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ENFORCE_EXECUTION.descr: Remove all [gold]Block[/gold] from the target. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ORIGINAL_SIN.title: Original Sin
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ORIGINAL_SIN.descriptio:
Auto-played at the start of combat.
Apply {ContemptOfCourtPower:diff()} [gold]Contempt of Court[/gold] to ALL enemies.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PUBLIC_OPINION.title: Public Opinion
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PUBLIC_OPINION.descript: This turn, whenever another player plays an Attack/Skill, you gain/lose 5 [gold]Oratrice[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_STARE_DECISIS.title: Stare Decisis
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_STARE_DECISIS.descripti: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Play a copy of the first other Attack you played this combat.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TOUCHING.title: Touching
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TOUCHING.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Surge[/gold] {Surge:diff()}.
|}Remove all [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold]. Draw 1 card per droplet removed.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CORNERING.title: Cornering
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CORNERING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
This card costs 1 more {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and its damage doubles.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RAGING_FLURRY.title: Raging Flurry
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RAGING_FLURRY.descripti: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Remove 1 [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] to add a 0-cost {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} copy of this card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_WATER_SPLASH.title: Water Splash
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SEDENE_STICKER.title: Sedene Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_KIARA_STICKER.title: Kiara Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TALOCHARD_STICKER.title: Talochard Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TALOCHARD_STICKER.descr:
Remove all Block and Artifact from an enemy.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_MAMERE_STICKER.title: Mamere Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_MAMERE_STICKER.descript: Add a random colorless card to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_XANA_STICKER.title: Xana Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_MENTHE_STICKER.title: Menthe Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_MENTHE_STICKER.descript: Add a random card costing {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)} or more to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_VERENATA_STICKER.title: Verenata Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PAHSIV_STICKER.title: Pahsiv Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PAHSIV_STICKER.descript: Choose 1 of 3 random [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] cards to add to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CANOTILA_STICKER.title: Canotila Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CANOTILA_STICKER.descri:
Choose 2 cards from your draw pile and add them to your hand.
You cannot gain this again this combat.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_AEVAL_STICKER.title: Aeval Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_AEVAL_STICKER.descripti:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Exhaust an Elphane Sticker in your hand to gain 10 more Block.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ELPHANE_STICKER.title: Elphane Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ELPHANE_STICKER.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Exhaust an Aeval Sticker in your hand to deal 10 more damage.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SUPPORTING_STRIKE.title: Supporting Strike
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SUPPORTING_STRIKE.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PARTING_GIFT.title: Parting Gift
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PARTING_GIFT.descriptio:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_STICKER_BOOK.title: Sticker Book
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_STICKER_BOOK.descriptio:
Add {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] to your hand.
Draw {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} card(s).
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_WARM_CURRENT.title: Warm Current
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_WARM_CURRENT.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have a [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] in your [gold]Hand[/gold], apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_REBIRTH.title: Rebirth
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SIGEWINNES_WILL.title: Sigewinne's Will
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SIGEWINNES_WILL.descrip: Every 9 [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] you play, add 1 Sigewinne Sticker to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SIGEWINNE_STICKER.title: Sigewinne Sticker
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_GOOD_MORNING.title: Good Morning
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_GOOD_MORNING.descriptio: At the start of your turn, add {StickerAmount:diff()} [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TRIAL_GROUP.title: Trial Group
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TRIAL_GROUP.description:
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] to your hand.
Add 1 of 3 random [gold]Minion[/gold] cards to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_MEGA_MAGIC_SWORD.title: Mega Magic Sword
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_MEGA_MAGIC_SWORD.descri: Play all [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] cards in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold]. Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage, increased by {IfUpgraded:show:3|2} per sticker.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RECOLLECTION.title: Recollection
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RECOLLECTION.descriptio:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Choose 1 card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] and transform it into a random [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_BAPTISM.title: Baptism
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_COURT_SESSION.title: Court Session
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_COURT_SESSION.descripti: The next {CourtSessionPower:diff()} card(s) you play will be [gold]Submitted[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_WATER_TIGHT.title: Water Tight
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_WATER_TIGHT.description: At the end of your turn, gain 2 [gold]Block[/gold] for each [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] you have.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_EXILE.title: Exile
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_EXILE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Select|Randomly} put 1 card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] at the bottom of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} equal to its cost.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_COMPENSATION.title: Compensation
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_COMPENSATION.descriptio:
Gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] for every {IfUpgraded:show:4|6} HP you are missing from your Max HP.{InCombat:
(Gain {StrengthAmount:diff()}.)|}
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TRIVIAL_MATTERS.title: Trivial Matters
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LAMINAR_FLOW.title: Laminar Flow
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LAMINAR_FLOW.descriptio: After playing your first Attack card each turn, remove {LaminarFlowPower:diff()} [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] to play it 1 additional time.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RAIN_DEW_SHARE.title: Rain Dew Share
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_ADMONITION.title: Admonition
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_INDIGNATION.title: Indignation
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_OCEANIC_EDICT.title: Oceanic Edict
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_OCEANIC_EDICT.descripti: Select {Cards:diff()} card(s) from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and add them to your hand. Remove {SourcewaterDroplet:diff()} [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] to play them instead.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_HYDRO_SOVEREIGNTY.title: Hydro Sovereignty
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_BREATH.title: Breath
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_BREATH.description: After you [gold]Surge[/gold], deal that much damage to ALL enemies.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LIQUEFACTION.title: Liquefaction
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_LIQUEFACTION.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Remove all your Block and [gold]Surge[/gold] for that much.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_COURT_ARGUMENT.title: Court Argument
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CHERISH.title: Cherish
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_CHERISH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. This card costs 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] in your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TRAVELING_SPORE.title: Traveling Spore
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_TRAVELING_SPORE.descrip: At the end of combat, remove this card and {Cards:diff()} other card(s) from your [gold]Deck[/gold] (remove 1 additional card when entering the next act).
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_THOUSAND_FINGERS_POINTI:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Hit 1 additional time for every 10 [gold]Oratrice[/gold] you have.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_PAST_DRACONIC_GLORIES.d:
Add 1 {IfUpgraded:show:Equitable Judgment+|Equitable Judgment} to your hand.
Equitable Judgment causes you to lose 2 additional HP, but deals double damage.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SPIDER_SILK_TRACE.title: Spider Silk Trace
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_SPIDER_SILK_TRACE.descr: [gold]Submit[/gold] all Status and Curse cards in your hand, then draw that many cards.
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RIFT_CARD.title: Rift
NEUVILLETTE_CARD_RIFT_CARD.description: At the end of your turn, if this card is in your hand, the All-Devouring Narwhal devours {Damage} of your Max HP.
